attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	SCOOHA.BATCH_ID, SCOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7,SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE10, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE18, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE19,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE20, SCOOHA.BOOKED_DATE,
		SCOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, SCOOHA.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
		SCOOHA.CREATED_BY, SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
		SCOOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER, SCOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
		SCOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, SCOOHA.FOB_POINT_CODE,
		SCOOHA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCOOHA.HEADER_ID, SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID, SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCOOHA.OPEN_FLAG,
		SCOOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE, SCOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,
		SCOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID, SCOOHA.ORDERED_DATE,
		SCOOHA.ORG_ID, SCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
		SCOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS, SCOOHA.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,
		SCOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID, SCOOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID,
		SCOOHA.PRICING_DATE, SCOOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		SCOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, SCOOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
		SCOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS, SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, SCOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID,
		SCOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, SCOOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE,
		SCOOHA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE11,
		'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE, SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE17,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13,SCOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
		SCOOHA.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE,
		SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE3
FROM	
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
			WHERE SCOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
			WHERE SCOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
			WHERE SCOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
			WHERE SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	 
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
			WHERE SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
			WHERE SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT)
OR   							
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
			WHERE SCOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
                        WHERE SCOOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
/* OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR 
                        WHERE CASE WHEN SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE 'AA%' THEN SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 ELSE NULL END = NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM EAPT 
                        WHERE EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID = SCOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME) */

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
				STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
				STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
STHDR_BK.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
STHDR_BK.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
 NULL AS SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SCOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER,
SCOOHA.HEADER_ID 	SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE	
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA  
		INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
			ON( SCOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
		 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') )  STHDR_BK,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT WHERE SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL') ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT SSO 
	WHERE 	SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
	(SELECT 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		ECOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER
	FROM  
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL ECOOHA  
			INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
				ON( ECOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
	)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			EXCEP_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			EXCEP_BK.ORDER_NUMBER=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA 
WHERE SCOOHA.ORG_ID = 3563 AND EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT 
WHERE SCOOHA.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
AND NSOT.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
AND NSOT.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD = 'CLOSED' 
AND ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y');

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	ECOOHA.BATCH_ID, ECOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
		ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5,
		ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6, ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7,ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE9,
		ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE10, ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12,
		ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE18, ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE19,
		ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE20, ECOOHA.BOOKED_DATE,
		ECOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, ECOOHA.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
		ECOOHA.CREATED_BY, ECOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
		ECOOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER, ECOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
		ECOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, ECOOHA.FOB_POINT_CODE,
		ECOOHA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, ECOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECOOHA.HEADER_ID, ECOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		ECOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID, ECOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		ECOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, ECOOHA.OPEN_FLAG,
		ECOOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE, ECOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,
		ECOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID, ECOOHA.ORDERED_DATE,
		ECOOHA.ORG_ID, ECOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
		ECOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS, ECOOHA.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,
		ECOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID, ECOOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID,
		ECOOHA.PRICING_DATE, ECOOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		ECOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, ECOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		ECOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, ECOOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
		ECOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS, ECOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
		ECOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, ECOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID,
		ECOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, ECOOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE,
		ECOOHA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE11,
ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE17,ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13,ECOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
ECOOHA.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE,
ECOOHA.ATTRIBUTE3
FROM	
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL ECOOHA WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA
 WHERE SCOOHA.HEADER_ID = ECOOHA.HEADER_ID )
